per_case.answer_excerpt: The Gold HVAC plan costs $249 per year and includes two tune-ups, a 15% repair discount, and priority scheduling [1]. The warranty on all repairs is extended to 1 year [2]. Gold members also have acce
per_case.answer_full:
The Gold HVAC plan costs $249 per year and includes two tune-ups, a 15% repair discount, and priority scheduling [1]. The warranty on all repairs is extended to 1 year [2]. Gold members also have access to same-day slots if booked before 11 am [3].

The Platinum HVAC plan costs $399 per year and offers unlimited tune-ups, a 20% repair discount, same-day priority, and free T1 repairs [4]. Similar to Gold, the warranty on all repairs is extended to 1 year, but repairs are covered at no charge [2]. Platinum members also receive same-day slots if booked before 11 am [3].

The "worth" of upgrading depends on your specific needs for tune-ups, repair discounts, and warranty coverage.

per_case.answer_excerpt: I understand your furnace stopped working shortly after our service. For major installations like a furnace, there is a 1-year labor warranty [1]. Additionally, all labor comes with a 90-day warranty
per_case.answer_full:
I understand your furnace stopped working shortly after our service. For major installations like a furnace, there is a 1-year labor warranty [1]. Additionally, all labor comes with a 90-day warranty from the date of service, meaning there's no charge for a return visit within that period [1].

To help you further, could you please provide your full name, phone number, and the ZIP code where the service was performed? This will help me locate your previous service and confirm the warranty coverage.

per_case.answer_excerpt: I can help you book an electrician to look at a faulty outlet. Outlet or switch replacement typically costs between $95 and $175 [1]. There is an $85 service call fee, which is waived if the repair to
per_case.answer_full:
I can help you book an electrician to look at a faulty outlet. Outlet or switch replacement typically costs between $95 and $175 [1]. There is an $85 service call fee, which is waived if the repair total exceeds $300 [1].

To book this, I need a bit more information. Could you please provide:
1. Your ZIP code.
2. Your preferred date for the service (within the next 60 days).
3. Your preferred time window (morning or afternoon).
